程序包的使用
org.apache.dubbo.metadata

  • 使用org.apache.dubbo.metadata的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.config.metadata  
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata  
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.report  
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.store  
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.store.failover  
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.store.nacos  
    org.apache.dubbo.metadata.store.zookeeper  
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.client
    * The inspiration of service registration and discovery comes from Spring Cloud Commons.
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.metadata  
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.metadata.store  
  • org.apache.dubbo.config.metadata使用的org.apache.dubbo.metadata中的类 
    类和说明
    MetadataService
    A framework interface of Dubbo Metadata Service defines the contract of Dubbo Services registration and subscription between Dubbo service providers and its consumers.
    MetadataServiceExporter
    The exporter of MetadataService
  • org.apache.dubbo.metadata使用的org.apache.dubbo.metadata中的类 
    类和说明
    MappingChangedEvent 
    MappingListener 
    MetadataChangeListener 
    MetadataInfo 
    MetadataInfo.ServiceInfo 
    MetadataParamsFilter 
    MetadataService
    A framework interface of Dubbo Metadata Service defines the contract of Dubbo Services registration and subscription between Dubbo service providers and its consumers.
    MetadataServiceExporter
    The exporter of MetadataService
    MetadataServiceType
    The type enumerations of MetadataService
    ServiceNameMapping
    The interface for Dubbo service name Mapping
    WritableMetadataService
    Local MetadataService that extends MetadataService and provides the modification, which is used for Dubbo's consumers and providers.
  • org.apache.dubbo.metadata.report使用的org.apache.dubbo.metadata中的类 
    类和说明
    MappingListener 
    MetadataInfo

    A framework interface of Dubbo Metadata Service defines the contract of Dubbo Services registration and subscription between Dubbo service providers and its consumers.

    Local MetadataService that extends MetadataService and provides the modification, which is used for Dubbo's consumers and providers.
